differential_diagnoses: Drug reaction with eosinophilia and systemic symptoms (DRESS) syndrome
next_steps: Place patient in airborne and contact isolation precautions
Perform PCR testing for VZV and HSV from vesicle fluid and ulcer swab
Perform punch biopsy of an active lesion for histopathology and immunohistochemical staining
Obtain HIV serology and CD4 count
Initiate empiric intravenous acyclovir pending diagnostic results
Perform Tzanck smear for rapid assessment of viral cytopathic effects
Consult infectious disease and dermatology specialists
